info.title: TVmaze API
info.description: Add television information to your own website or app with a fast and clean TV API. Add schedules, show, episode, cast information, and more. This is a free, fast and clean REST API that returns JSON and conforms to the HATEOAS and HAL principles.

get.description: Search through all the shows in the database by show name. A fuzzy algorithm is used (with a fuzziness value of 2), meaning that shows will be found even if your query contains small typos. Results are returned in order of relevancy (best matches on top).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query for show name

200.description: Successful response with array of show search results

get.description: Returns exactly one result or no result at all. This endpoint is forgiving of typos but less so than regular search (fuzziness of 1 instead of 2). Allows embedding additional information in the result.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query for show name

200.description: Successful response with single show

get.description: Find a show by its TVRage, TheTVDB, or IMDB ID. Returns a HTTP 301 redirect to the show's URL if found, otherwise HTTP 404.
Search through all the people in the database, using the same mechanism as show searches.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query for person name

200.description: Successful response with array of person search results

get.description: A complete list of episodes that air in a given country on a given date. Episodes are returned in the order in which they are aired. Only returns episodes tied to a specific country via a Network or local Web Channel.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted date (defaults to current day)

200.description: Successful response with array of scheduled episodes

get.description: A complete list of episodes that air on web/streaming channels on a given date. Leave out country parameter for both local and global channels, set to ISO code for local only, or set to empty string for global only.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 country code (optional, empty string for global only)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted date (defaults to current day)

200.description: Successful response with array of scheduled web episodes

get.description: A list of all future episodes known to TVmaze, regardless of their country. Response is at least several MB large. Results are cached for 24 hours.

200.description: Successful response with array of all future episodes

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given show. This endpoint allows embedding of additional information.

200.description: Successful response with show information

get.description: A list of all shows in the database, with all primary information included. Paginated with a maximum of 250 results per page. Results are cached for up to 24 hours.

200.description: Successful response with array of shows

get.description: A complete list of episodes for the given show. Episodes are returned in their airing order. By default, specials are not included.

parameters.name: specials
parameters.description: Include specials in the list (1 to include)

200.description: Successful response with array of episodes

get.description: Alternate episode lists for this show, for example DVD ordering.

200.description: Successful response with array of alternate lists

get.description: Get information about a specific alternate list.

200.description: Successful response with alternate list information

get.description: Get episodes from an alternate list.

200.description: Successful response with array of alternate episodes

get.description: Retrieve one specific episode from this show given its season number and episode number.

200.description: Successful response with episode information

get.description: Retrieve all episodes from this show that have aired on a specific date. Useful for daily talk shows that don't adhere to common season numbering.

200.description: Successful response with array of episodes

404.description: No episodes found for this date

get.description: A complete list of seasons for the given show. Seasons are returned in ascending order.

200.description: Successful response with array of seasons

get.description: A list of episodes in this season. Specials are always included. This endpoint allows embedding of additional information.

200.description: Successful response with array of episodes

get.description: A list of main cast for a show. Each cast item is a combination of a person and a character. Items are ordered by importance.

200.description: Successful response with array of cast members

get.description: A list of main crew for a show. Each crew item is a combination of a person and their crew type.

200.description: Successful response with array of crew members

get.description: A list of AKA's (aliases) for a show. An AKA with country set to null indicates an AKA in the show's original country.

200.description: Successful response with array of AKAs

get.description: A list of all images available for this show. Image types can be poster, banner, background, typography, or null.

200.description: Successful response with array of images

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given episode. This endpoint allows embedding of additional information.

200.description: Successful response with episode information

get.description: Retrieve all guest cast starring in an episode.

200.description: Successful response with array of guest cast members

get.description: Retrieve all guest crew working on an episode.

200.description: Successful response with array of guest crew members

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given person. This endpoint allows embedding of additional information.

200.description: Successful response with person information

get.description: A list of all people in the database. Paginated with a maximum of 1000 results per page.

200.description: Successful response with array of people

get.description: Retrieve all (show-level) cast credits for a person. A cast credit is a combination of both a show and a character.

200.description: Successful response with array of cast credits

get.description: Retrieve all (show-level) crew credits for a person. A crew credit is combination of both a show and a crew type.

200.description: Successful response with array of crew credits

get.description: Retrieve all (episode-level) guest cast credits for a person. A guest cast credit is a combination of both an episode and a character.

200.description: Successful response with array of guest cast credits

get.description: A list of all shows in the TVmaze database and the timestamp when they were last updated. Can be filtered to only include shows updated in the past day, week, or month.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter by time period (day, week, or month)

200.description: Successful response with show updates

get.description: Like the show updates endpoint, but for people. A person is considered updated when any of their attributes are changed, or when a cast/crew credit involving them is created or deleted.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter by time period (day, week, or month)

200.description: Successful response with person updates

voice.description: Whether this is a voice role

main.description: Whether this is the main image

url.description: TVmaze URL for the alternate list

name.description: Name of alternate list (e.g., DVD Order)

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search operations for shows and people

tags.name: Updates
tags.description: Update tracking for shows and people
